name: Potatoes and Onions in Sweet and Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 small New potatoes, cut into quarters
12 Black or green olives, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over high heat, heat the olive oil.
2. Add the onion and sauté for 2 minutes until softened.
3. Add the potatoes, water, capers (if using), and olives to the skillet.
4. Cover the pan and lower the heat to medium.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are barely soft, about 7 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and continue cooking until all liquid has evaporated.
7. Dissolve the sugar in the vinegar.
8. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
9. Serve warm or chilled. The flavor improves if the dish is refrigerated for a couple of days.
223 cal, 11g fat, 0 chol per serving
